focalfunc: func (d *dbBase) readValuesSQL(tables *dbTables, cols []string, qs querySet, mi *models.ModelInfo, cond *Condition, tz *time.Location) (string, []interface{})
funcbody:
func (d *dbBase) readValuesSQL(tables *dbTables, cols []string, qs querySet, mi *models.ModelInfo, cond *Condition, tz *time.Location) (string, []interface{}) {
	buf := buffers.Get()
	defer buffers.Put(buf)

	args := d.readSQL(buf, tables, cols, cond, qs, mi, tz)

	query := buf.String()

	d.ins.ReplaceMarks(&query)

	return query, args
}
